race.comment: Four major chances before the race falls away. MISS HIMALAYA (10) is going better than form suggests and looks ideally placed to find winning form. Very honest despite sparse winning record and the last two has drawn off the track. Much better gate here and looks a value chance. ROCKETTE ROULETTE (11) is in a similar boat going better than the recent form looks. Placed at Pakenham two back in a richer race then not far away last time here over a sharper trip. Can do much better. AMERICAN RUSS (4) is building to a win and looks ready to peak. Has a low draw and should enjoy a soft run behind the lead. DENSETSU (2) is a last start winner here drawn to go forward and will give a sight.
